\tzpentry{ID5791}{Lagrangian}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5791 introduces Lagrangian as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \frac{dL}{dt} = \int_V (\mathbf{r} \times \mathbf{J}) \times \mathbf{B}\, d^3x \;\Longrightarrow\; \omega(t) = \omega_0 \exp\!\left(\int_{0}^{t} \gamma_{\mathrm{amplification}}\, d\tau\right). \]
